Third-party assets bundled for offline use

Bootstrap 4.3.1
Copyright 2011-2019 The Bootstrap Authors and Twitter, Inc.

jQuery 3.6.1
Copyright OpenJS Foundation and other contributors.
License: MIT (https://jquery.org/license/)

Chess piece images
From chessboard.js by Chris Oakman.
License: MIT (https://github.com/oakmac/chessboardjs/blob/master/LICENSE.md)

The local chessboard compatibility implementation in vendor/chessboardjs/js is part
of this project adaptation and uses the public chessboard.js callback/class contract.
